chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2906 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah 17.11.2025 Mr. Allah Wadhayo Mirani, advocate for Applicant. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, A.P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- Applicant and co-accused Muhammad Sohail were arrested by a Police team of P.S. Boat Basin, Karachi on 25.09.2025 from Peela Ground opposite Meezan Bank Clifton, Karachi. From applicant 525 grams of Charas and from co-accused 540 grams Charas was recovered. 2. Applicant’s counsel submits that he is the first offender and the offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Learned APG has opposed bail but we concur with the defence counsel that the offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause. There is no criminal record showing involvement of the applicant in identical offence. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R. bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. This Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
